## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Change Type

- [ ] feat
- [ ] fix
- [ ] docs
- [ ] chore
- [ ] refactor
- [ ] test
- [ ] ci
- [ ] release

## Scope

- Primary scope:
- Affected feeds/sources:
- Any breaking behavior:

## Validation

- [ ] Manual run completed
- [ ] Tests added/updated (if applicable)
- [ ] Existing tests pass

Commands run:

```bash
# add commands used for validation
```

## Outputs / Artifacts

List paths or files produced/changed (for example transcripts, indexes, config).

## Release Notes

- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated (release PRs)
- [ ] Version metadata updated (release PRs)
- [ ] Tag plan noted (release PRs)

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch naming follows `codex/<type>/<scope>-<short-description>`
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commit format
- [ ] No unrelated file noise included (for example `.DS_Store`)
